description: This file contains SCSS styles for headings, display classes, emphasis, lists, and blockquotes, including mixins and extend directives for styling components.
external_files: variables or mixins files (implied by usage of @include and variables like $lead-font-size)

methods.name: font-size
methods.description: Mixin for setting font size, likely defined elsewhere

methods.name: list-unstyled
methods.description: Mixin for removing list styles, defined elsewhere
